findings.finding: Trivially satisfied — openQuestions array is empty, confirmed by both frontmatter and document body (no Open Questions section content).

api-types.ts is listed in Implementation Notes (action: new) and described in Research section 'What moves to Rust' with 10+ endpoint types enumerated. Decision 'api-types.ts is the canonical migration contract' explicitly defines the contract. Memory project already has api-types.ts created per Architecture facts.

Schema v3 migration adding decay_profile, version, and last_accessed columns is documented in Architecture facts ('Memory system schema v3') and Implementation Notes fileScope for factstore.ts. All three columns are explicitly listed.

Decision 'Decay profile stored as an enum column on each fact' directly addresses per-fact decay_profile usage. Implementation Notes constrain 'Per-fact decay_profile must be used at read-time, not store-wide default'. Research section 3 identifies the bug and the fix.

Decision 'JSONL format stays identical; Lamport version field added' specifies Lamport clock semantics: 'version: u64 (Lamport logical timestamp)' with 'MAX(version)+1 per mutation'. Implementation Notes constraint confirms 'Lamport version is MAX(version)+1 per mutation — never use wall-clock as version'. Research section on git-sync conflict resolution provides rationale.
